name: Brown University
meets_full_need_notes: Brown meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Brown also meets full need for international students.
no_loan_notes: Brown eliminated loans from financial aid packages in 2023. All aid replaced with grants. Students from families earning under $125,000 with typical assets receive particularly generous grant packages.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Aid package released with admission decision; students may withdraw from ED if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Brown reviews appeals based on changed financial circumstances. Students submit Professional Judgment requests with documentation.
